ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "gender_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of gender prediction */,
  "profile_yn" TEXT /* Indicates if the user has a profile image */,
  "profile_yn_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of profile image prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or bio of the user */,
  "fav_number" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has been favorited */,
  "gender_gold" TEXT /* Gold standard gender annotation */,
  "link_color" TEXT /* Color code associated with the user */,
  "profile_yn_gold" TEXT /* Gold standard profile image annotation */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "sidebar_color" TEXT /* Color code for the user's sidebar */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the user's tweet */,
  "tweet_coord" TEXT /* Coordinates of the tweet */,
  "tweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets by the user */,
  "tweet_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tweet */,
  "tweet_location" TEXT /* Location associated with the tweet */,
  "user_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Detailed location of the user (city, state, country) */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "verified_account" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's account is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A score representing the user's overall engagement on the platform */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., personal, business, influencer) */,
  "interests" TEXT /* JSON array of user interests */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* JSON object of user privacy settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "tweet_coord" TEXT /* Coordinates of the tweet */,
  "tweet_location" TEXT /* Location associated with the tweet */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* JSON array of hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* JSON array of user mentions in the tweet */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "retweet_source_id" TEXT /* ID of the original tweet if it is a retweet */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A score representing the tweet's engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "fav_number" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been favorited */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (like, retweet, reply, quote) */,
  "engagement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the engagement */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* A score representing the user's engagement on this specific tweet */,
  "engagement_device" TEXT /* Device used for engagement (mobile, web, etc.) */,
  "engagement_location" TEXT /* Location of the user during engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "profile_yn_gold" TEXT /* Gold standard annotation for profile image presence */,
  "link_color" TEXT /* Color code associated with the user's links */,
  "sidebar_color" TEXT /* Color code for the user's sidebar */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the user's website */,
  "profile_completion" INTEGER /* Percentage of profile completion */,
  "profile_views" INTEGER /* Number of profile views */,
  "account_age" INTEGER /* Age of the account in days */,
  "account_activity" TEXT /* JSON array of recent account activities */,
  "interests" TEXT /* JSON array of user interests */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* JSON object of user privacy settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
